Resource Profile: KBV_PR_WEST_Condition

Official URL: https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_WEST_Condition Version: 1.0.0-kommentierung
Draft as of 2026-03-18 Computable Name: KBV_PR_WEST_Condition

Copyright/Legal: Im folgenden Profil können Codes aus den Code-Systemen SNOMED CT®, LOINC, Ucum, ATC, ICD-10-GM, ICD-10-WHO, OPS, Alpha-ID/Alpha-ID-SE und ICF enthalten sein, die dem folgenden Urheberrecht unterliegen: This material includes SNOMED CT® Clinical Terms® (SNOMED CT® CT®) which is used by permission of SNOMED CT® International. All rights reserved. SNOMED CT® CT®, was originally created by The College of American Pathologists. SNOMED CT® and SNOMED CT® CT are registered trademarks of SNOMED CT® International. Implementers of these artefacts must have the appropriate SNOMED CT® CT Affiliate license. This material contains content from LOINC (http://LOINC.org). LOINC is copyright © 1995-2020, Regenstrief Institute, Inc. and the Logical Observation Identifiers Names and Codes (LOINC) Committee and is available at no cost under the license at http://LOINC.org/license. LOINC® is a registered United States trademark of Regenstrief Institute, Inc. This product includes all or a portion of the UCUM table, UCUM codes, and UCUM definitions or is derived from it, subject to a license from Regenstrief Institute, Inc. and The UCUM Organization. Your use of the UCUM table, UCUM codes, UCUM definitions also is subject to this license, a copy of which is available at http://unitsofmeasure.org. The current complete UCUM table, UCUM Specification are available for download at http://unitsofmeasure.org. The UCUM table and UCUM codes are copyright © 1995-2009, Regenstrief Institute, Inc. and the Unified Codes for Units of Measures (UCUM) Organization. All rights reserved. THE UCUM TABLE (IN ALL FORMATS), UCUM DEFINITIONS, AND SPECIFICATION ARE PROVIDED ‘AS IS.’ ANY EXPRESS OR IMPLIED WARRANTIES ARE DISCLAIMED, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, THE IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. Dieses Material enthält Inhalte aus ATC. Die Erstellung erfolgte unter Verwendung der Datenträger der amtlichen Fassung der ATC-Klassifikation mit DDD des Bundesinstituts für Arzneimittel und Medizinprodukte (BfArM). Dieses Material enthält Inhalte aus ICD-10-GM, ICD-10-WHO, OPS Alpha-ID ans Alpha-ID-SE. Die Erstellung erfolgt unter Verwendung der maschinenlesbaren Fassung des Bundesinstituts für Arzneimittel und Medizinprodukte (BfArM). Dieses Material enthält Inhalte aus ICF. Die Erstellung erfolgt unter Verwendung der maschinenlesbaren Fassung des Deutschen Instituts für Medizinische Dokumentation und Information (DIMDI). ICF-Kodes, -Begriffe und -Texte © Weltgesundheitsorganisation, übersetzt und herausgegeben durch das Deutsche Institut für Medizinische Dokumentation und Information von der International classification of functioning, disability and health - ICF, herausgegeben durch die Weltgesundheitsorganisation.

Hier können alle Informationen angegeben werden, die im Zusammenhang mit einer Diagnosestellung stehen.

Usages:

  • Refer to this Profile: KBV_PR_WEST_Encounter and KBV_PR_WEST_ServiceRequest
  • Examples for this Profile: Condition/67796ba0-61d0-4120-9d31-f9690fd88eaa and Condition/8d84156a-fe2b-4eb8-b87e-57fe51b641d0

You can also check for usages in the FHIR IG Statistics

Documentation for this format

Terminology Bindings

Path Status Usage ValueSet Version Source
Condition.clinicalStatus Base required Condition Clinical Status Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Condition.verificationStatus Base required ConditionVerificationStatus 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Condition.category Base extensible Condition Category Codes 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Condition.category:diagnosekategorie Base required KBV_VS_WEST_Diagnosekategorie 📦1.0.0-kommentierung This IG
Condition.category:diagnoseart Base required KBV_VS_WEST_Diagnoseart 📦1.0.0-kommentierung This IG
Condition.severity Base preferred Condition/Diagnosis Severity 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Condition.severity.coding:snomed Base required Condition/Diagnosis Severity 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Condition.code Base example Condition/Problem/Diagnosis Codes 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Condition.code.coding:snomed Base required Diagnose SNOMED CT® 📦1.8.0 kbv.basis v1.8
Condition.bodySite Base example SNOMED CT Body Structures 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Condition.bodySite.coding:snomed Base example SNOMED CT Body Structures 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Condition.onset[x]:onsetRange.​extension:lebensphase-von.​value[x].coding Base required LebensphaseDe ValueSet 📦1.5.4 de.basisprofil.r4 v1.5
Condition.onset[x]:onsetAge.​comparator Base required QuantityComparator 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Condition.abatement[x]:abatementRange.​extension:lebensphase-bis.​value[x].coding Base required LebensphaseDe ValueSet 📦1.5.4 de.basisprofil.r4 v1.5
Condition.abatement[x]:abatementAge.​comparator Base required QuantityComparator 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
Rec1 warning Condition Das Dokumentationsdatum soll mindestens mit MM.JJJJ angegeben werden. recordedDate.exists() implies recordedDate.toString().length()>=7
con-3 best practice Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL be present if verificationStatus is not entered-in-error and category is problem-list-item clinicalStatus.exists() or verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code = 'entered-in-error').exists() or category.select($this='problem-list-item').empty()
con-4 error Condition If condition is abated, then clinicalStatus must be either inactive, resolved, or remission abatement.empty() or clinicalStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical' and (code='resolved' or code='remission' or code='inactive')).exists()
con-5 error Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL NOT be present if verification Status is entered-in-error verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code='entered-in-error').empty() or clinicalStatus.empty()
dom-2 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Condition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Condition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Condition A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()
icd-regex warning Condition.code.coding:ICD-10-GM.code In code sind nur gültige ICD-10-Codes ohne Zusätze erlaubt matches('^[A-Z][0-9][A-Z0-9](\\.?[A-Z0-9]{0,4})?$')

userSelected 0..0 If this coding was chosen directly by the user
coding:snomed S 0..1 Coding Code defined by a terminology system
system S 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
version S 1..1 string Version of the system - if relevant
code S 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
userSelected 0..0 If this coding was chosen directly by the user

system S 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
code S 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
userSelected 0..0 If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text S 0..1 string Diagnoseerläuterung
bodySite S 0..* CodeableConcept Körperstelle
coding S 0..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Slices for coding Content/Rules for all slices
coding:snomed S 0..1 Coding Code defined by a terminology system
system S 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
code S 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
text S 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
subject S 1..1 Reference(KBV_PR_WEST_Patient(1.0.0-kommentierung)) Who has the condition?
reference S 1..1 string Literal reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL
type 0..0 Type the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
identifier 0..0 Logical reference, when literal reference is not known
display 0..0 Text alternative for the resource
encounter 0..0 Encounter created as part of
onset[x] S 0..1 dateTime, Age, Period, Range Klinisch relevanter Zeitraum Anfang
Slices for onset[x] Content/Rules for all slices
onset[x]:onsetPeriod S 0..1 Period Estimated or actual date, date-time, or age
onset[x]:onsetRange S 0..1 Range Lebensphase-von
Slices for extension 0..* Extension Extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by value:url
extension:lebensphase-von S 0..1 ExtensionLebensphase Optional Extensions Element
value[x] S 1..1 CodeableConcept Value of extension
onset[x]:onsetDateTime S 0..1 dateTime Datum Anfang
onset[x]:onsetAge S 0..1 Age Alter
onset[x]:onsetString 0..0 Klinisch relevanter Zeitraum Anfang
abatement[x] S 0..1 dateTime, Age, Period, Range Klinischer Zeitraum Ende
Slices for abatement[x] Content/Rules for all slices
abatement[x]:abatementPeriod S 0..1 Period When in resolution/remission
abatement[x]:abatementRange S 0..1 Range When in resolution/remission
Slices for extension 0..* Extension Extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by value:url
extension:lebensphase-bis S 0..1 ExtensionLebensphase Optional Extensions Element

abatement[x]:abatementAge S 0..1 Age Lebenphase bis
abatement[x]:abatementString 0..0 Klinischer Zeitraum Ende
recordedDate S 0..1 dateTime Dokumentationsdatum
recorder 0..0 Who recorded the condition
asserter S 0..1 Reference(KBV_PR_WEST_Practitioner(1.0.0-kommentierung) | KBV_PR_WEST_PractitionerRole(1.0.0-kommentierung)) Person who asserts this condition
reference S 0..1 string Literal reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL
type 0..0 Type the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
identifier 0..0 Logical reference, when literal reference is not known
display 0..0 Text alternative for the resource
stage 0..0 Stage/grade, usually assessed formally
evidence 0..0 Supporting evidence
note S 0..1 Annotation Freitextbeschreibung
Slices for author[x] S 0..1 Reference(Practitioner | Patient | RelatedPerson | Organization), string Individual responsible for the annotation
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
author[x]:authorReference S 0..1 Reference(Practitioner | Patient | RelatedPerson | Organization | KBV_PR_Base_Practitioner(1.8.0) | KBV_PR_Base_Patient(1.8.0) | KBV_PR_Base_RelatedPerson(1.8.0) | KBV_PR_Base_Organization(1.8.0)) Individual responsible for the annotation
author[x]:authorString S 0..1 string Individual responsible for the annotation
time S 0..1 dateTime When the annotation was made
text S 1..1 markdown The annotation - text content (as markdown)

Path Status Usage ValueSet Version Source

Condition.code Base example Condition/Problem/Diagnosis Codes 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.

Condition.bodySite Base example SNOMED CT Body Structures 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Condition.bodySite.coding:snomed Base example SNOMED CT Body Structures 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.

Condition.onset[x]:onsetAge.​comparator Base required QuantityComparator 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.

Condition.stage.summary Base example Condition Stage 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.

Condition.evidence.code Base example Manifestation and Symptom Codes 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
Rec1 warning Condition Das Dokumentationsdatum soll mindestens mit MM.JJJJ angegeben werden. recordedDate.exists() implies recordedDate.toString().length()>=7
con-3 best practice Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL be present if verificationStatus is not entered-in-error and category is problem-list-item clinicalStatus.exists() or verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code = 'entered-in-error').exists() or category.select($this='problem-list-item').empty()
con-4 error Condition If condition is abated, then clinicalStatus must be either inactive, resolved, or remission abatement.empty() or clinicalStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical' and (code='resolved' or code='remission' or code='inactive')).exists()
con-5 error Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL NOT be present if verification Status is entered-in-error verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code='entered-in-error').empty() or clinicalStatus.empty()
dom-2 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Condition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Condition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Condition A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()
icd-regex warning Condition.code.coding:ICD-10-GM.code In code sind nur gültige ICD-10-Codes ohne Zusätze erlaubt matches('^[A-Z][0-9][A-Z0-9](\\.?[A-Z0-9]{0,4})?$')

This structure is derived from KBV_PR_Base_Condition_Diagnosis

Summary

Mandatory: 7 elements(14 nested mandatory elements)
Must-Support: 89 elements
Fixed: 3 elements
Prohibited: 34 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • KBV_PR_WEST_Patient (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_WEST_Patient|1.0.0-kommentierung)
  • KBV_PR_WEST_Practitioner (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_WEST_Practitioner|1.0.0-kommentierung)
  • KBV_PR_WEST_PractitionerRole (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_WEST_PractitionerRole|1.0.0-kommentierung)
  • KBV_PR_Base_Practitioner (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_Base_Practitioner|1.8.0)
  • KBV_PR_Base_Patient (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_Base_Patient|1.8.0)
  • KBV_PR_Base_RelatedPerson (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_Base_RelatedPerson|1.8.0)
  • KBV_PR_Base_Organization (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_Base_Organization|1.8.0)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_EX_Base_Additional_Comment
  • https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_EX_WEST_Diagnose_istDauerdiagnose
  • https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_EX_WEST_istAbrechnungsrelevant

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Condition.meta.profile
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Condition.category (Closed)
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Condition.note.author[x] (Closed)

Path Status Usage ValueSet Version Source

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
Rec1 warning Condition Das Dokumentationsdatum soll mindestens mit MM.JJJJ angegeben werden. recordedDate.exists() implies recordedDate.toString().length()>=7
con-3 best practice Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL be present if verificationStatus is not entered-in-error and category is problem-list-item clinicalStatus.exists() or verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code = 'entered-in-error').exists() or category.select($this='problem-list-item').empty()
con-4 error Condition If condition is abated, then clinicalStatus must be either inactive, resolved, or remission abatement.empty() or clinicalStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical' and (code='resolved' or code='remission' or code='inactive')).exists()
con-5 error Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL NOT be present if verification Status is entered-in-error verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code='entered-in-error').empty() or clinicalStatus.empty()
dom-2 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()

dom-5 error Condition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Condition A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()

ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

userSelected 0..0 If this coding was chosen directly by the user

subject S 1..1 Reference(KBV_PR_WEST_Patient(1.0.0-kommentierung)) Who has the condition?

type 0..0 Type the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
identifier 0..0 Logical reference, when literal reference is not known
display 0..0 Text alternative for the resource
encounter 0..0 Encounter created as part of
onset[x] S 0..1 dateTime, Age, Period, Range Klinisch relevanter Zeitraum Anfang
Slices for onset[x] Content/Rules for all slices

type 0..0 Type the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
identifier 0..0 Logical reference, when literal reference is not known
display 0..0 Text alternative for the resource
stage 0..0 Stage/grade, usually assessed formally
evidence 0..0 Supporting evidence
note S 0..1 Annotation Freitextbeschreibung
Slices for author[x] S 0..1 Reference(Practitioner | Patient | RelatedPerson | Organization), string Individual responsible for the annotation
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
author[x]:authorReference S 0..1 Reference(Practitioner | Patient | RelatedPerson | Organization | KBV_PR_Base_Practitioner(1.8.0) | KBV_PR_Base_Patient(1.8.0) | KBV_PR_Base_RelatedPerson(1.8.0) | KBV_PR_Base_Organization(1.8.0)) Individual responsible for the annotation
author[x]:authorString S 0..1 string Individual responsible for the annotation
time S 0..1 dateTime When the annotation was made
text S 1..1 markdown The annotation - text content (as markdown)

Condition.stage.summary Base example Condition Stage 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Condition.stage.type Base example Condition Stage Type 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Condition.evidence.code Base example Manifestation and Symptom Codes 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
Rec1 warning Condition Das Dokumentationsdatum soll mindestens mit MM.JJJJ angegeben werden. recordedDate.exists() implies recordedDate.toString().length()>=7
con-3 best practice Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL be present if verificationStatus is not entered-in-error and category is problem-list-item clinicalStatus.exists() or verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code = 'entered-in-error').exists() or category.select($this='problem-list-item').empty()
con-4 error Condition If condition is abated, then clinicalStatus must be either inactive, resolved, or remission abatement.empty() or clinicalStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical' and (code='resolved' or code='remission' or code='inactive')).exists()
con-5 error Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL NOT be present if verification Status is entered-in-error verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code='entered-in-error').empty() or clinicalStatus.empty()
dom-2 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Condition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Condition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Condition A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()
icd-regex warning Condition.code.coding:ICD-10-GM.code In code sind nur gültige ICD-10-Codes ohne Zusätze erlaubt matches('^[A-Z][0-9][A-Z0-9](\\.?[A-Z0-9]{0,4})?$')

This structure is derived from KBV_PR_Base_Condition_Diagnosis

Summary

Mandatory: 7 elements(14 nested mandatory elements)
Must-Support: 89 elements
Fixed: 3 elements
Prohibited: 34 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • KBV_PR_WEST_Patient (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_WEST_Patient|1.0.0-kommentierung)
  • KBV_PR_WEST_Practitioner (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_WEST_Practitioner|1.0.0-kommentierung)
  • KBV_PR_WEST_PractitionerRole (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_WEST_PractitionerRole|1.0.0-kommentierung)
  • KBV_PR_Base_Practitioner (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_Base_Practitioner|1.8.0)
  • KBV_PR_Base_Patient (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_Base_Patient|1.8.0)
  • KBV_PR_Base_RelatedPerson (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_Base_RelatedPerson|1.8.0)
  • KBV_PR_Base_Organization (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_Base_Organization|1.8.0)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_EX_Base_Additional_Comment
  • https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_EX_WEST_Diagnose_istDauerdiagnose
  • https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_EX_WEST_istAbrechnungsrelevant

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Condition.meta.profile
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Condition.category (Closed)
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Condition.note.author[x] (Closed)

 

Other representations of profile: CSV, Excel, Schematron
